Surname.jp: 【獣人解放戦線】の前向き戦士

description.en: Attacks all enemies.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与える。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체에게 피해를 입힙니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 对全体敌人造成伤害。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。

description.en: (Passive Effect) When hit, has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52502_0]</color> chance to reduce the cooldown of <color=#28d9ed>Pressure Festival</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52502_1] turn(s)</color> and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> by <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52502_0]</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)ダメージを受けた場合、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52502_0]</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>【三散祭り】</color>のスキルターンが<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52502_1]ターン</color>減少し、<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52502_0]</color>UPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과) 피격 시 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52502_0]</color> 확률로 <color=#28d9ed>압박축제</color>의 스킬 쿨타임이 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52502_1]턴</color> 감소하고, <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>가 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52502_0]</color> 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)受到攻击时,有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52502_0]</color>的几率使<color=#28d9ed>压迫庆典</color>的技能冷却时间减少<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52502_1]回合</color>,并使<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>[buff_v_tower_element_52502_0]</color>。

description.en: Attacks all enemies and has a <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52503_0]</color> chance to increase the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Resilience</color> for <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52503_0] turn(s)</color>.\nDamage dealt increases proportional to the caster's <color=#28d9ed>Health</color>.
description.jp: 敵全体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52503_0]</color>の確率で自分の<color=#28d9ed>効果抵抗</color>を<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52503_0]ターン</color>の間UPさせる。\nこのスキルは自分の<color=#28d9ed>HP</color>が高いほどダメージがUPする。
description.kr: 적 전체를 공격하고 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52503_0]</color> 확률로 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>효과 저항</color>을 <color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52503_0]턴</color> 동안 증가시킵니다.\n이 스킬은 자신의 <color=#28d9ed>체력</color>이 높을수록 피해가 증가합니다.
description.zh: 攻击全体敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>[buff_c_tower_element_52503_0]</color>的几率使自身的<color=#28d9ed>效果抵抗</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>[buff_t_tower_element_52503_0]回合</color>。\n自身<color=#28d9ed>生命值</color>越高,则该技能的伤害越高。
